task_completion.description: Verify the 'Vandenberg_SCC' ground station is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station configuration, settings menu, or dashboard indicator showing 'Vandenberg_SCC' with Latitude 34.7420 (or 34.742 N), Longitude -120.5724 (or 120.5724 W), and Altitude 112m.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'Decay_Monitor' exists and is the active tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tab, window, or dashboard panel titled 'Decay_Monitor' that is currently selected or brought to the foreground.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Decay_Monitor' module is using 'Vandenberg_SCC' as its ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text in the 'Decay_Monitor' header, footer, or settings indicating the active ground station or observer location is 'Vandenberg_SCC'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct satellites are being tracked in the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for ISS (ZARYA) or 25544, CSS (TIANHE) or 48274, and SUOMI NPP or 37849 listed in the 'Decay_Monitor' tracking list.

task_completion.description: Verify the module shows Altitude, Velocity, and Orbit Number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the columns or data fields in the 'Decay_Monitor' list. There must be specific columns/fields for 'Altitude', 'Velocity', and 'Orbit Number' (or their standard abbreviations like Alt, Vel, Orbit).

task_completion.description: Verify the layout of 'Decay_Monitor' displays only the Satellite List.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Decay_Monitor' view. It should only display a tabular list of the satellites and their telemetry. There should be no maps, polar plots, or other graphical tracking widgets visible in this specific module's layout.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface to configure the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the application's UI, settings dialogs, or menus being interacted with, rather than just a terminal window editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the telemetry data appears genuine and dynamically generated.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for realistic numerical values in the Altitude, Velocity, and Orbit Number fields, rather than blank fields, placeholder text, or obvious static HTML mockups.

integrity.description: Verify the UI was not manipulated using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer console/inspector is not open, and the fonts, alignment, and styling of the 'Decay_Monitor' tab and its contents match the native application's design.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vandenberg_SCC coordinates must be exactly: Latitude 34.7420 N, Longitude 120.5724 W (or -120.5724), Altitude 112m. The required satellites and their NORAD IDs are ISS (ZARYA) [25544], CSS (TIANHE) [48274], and SUOMI NPP [37849].
